q: How to scale myself as a founder
diagnostic: You cannot scale yourself. You can only scale your intent. Encode your decision logic into an autonomous boardroom and let it carry your standards into every corner of the organization, 24/7.
answer: You cannot scale yourself. You can only scale your intent. Encode your decision logic into an autonomous boardroom and let it carry your standards into every corner of the organization, 24/7.
description: Human bandwidth ceiling — the leader moves from finance to marketing to production in a single afternoon, crushed by context switches.
symptom: 15–25 hours per week in alignment meetings. Decision fatigue. Founder burnout. Family strain.
